name: FOXGLOVE BOOKS
subtitle: Bookshop · New & Secondhand
tagline: An indie bookshop in York — new releases, rare finds, and a coffee corner at the back.

services.name: New Releases
services.desc: The week's big titles and the quiet ones worth your time, hand-shelved.

services.name: Secondhand & Rare
services.desc: Two floors of used stock plus a glass case of collectable first editions.

services.name: Book Subscriptions
services.desc: A wrapped surprise pick a month, matched to your taste by our staff.

services.name: Events & Signings
services.desc: Author evenings, book clubs and kids' story time — see our board in-store.

services.name: Gift Cards
services.desc: The safest present for a reader. Spend in-store or online, never expires.

services.name: Coffee Corner
services.desc: A proper flat white at the back while you browse. Books and a brew.

about.title: A bookshop that earns its regulars.
paragraphs: FOXGLOVE opened in 2015 on Micklegate and somehow kept its regulars through every high-street shake-up since.
We stock what we'd actually read — new, secondhand and the occasional dusty first edition — and we'll tell you honestly if we wouldn't.
The coffee corner at the back is free to sit in if you're deep in a chapter. That's the whole point.

whyChoose.text: Staff who've read the stock — real recommendations, not algorithms
New and secondhand side by side — find a gem at any budget
Independent and local — every sale stays in York

reviews.name: Geoff P.
reviews.text: Ten years and they still remember what I like. The rare shelf is dangerous for my wallet.

reviews.name: Yuki N.
reviews.text: Story time for the kids, coffee for me, and an hour that vanishes. Lovely.

reviews.name: Holly D.
reviews.text: Bought a first edition I'd hunted for years. Staff knew exactly what they had.
